subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These have turned to Thy Most Glorious Kingdom and beseeched Thy Supreme Dominion and yearned for effacement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان هولاء تبتلوا الی ملکوتک الابهی و تضرعوا الی جبروتک الاعلی و تمنوا الفناء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
